title_zh: 每周 AI-for-CAE 论文推送
intro_zh: 本周检索覆盖 2026-07-03 至 2026-07-10，主发现池来自本地 daily digest 候选日志，并补查近 24-48 小时 arXiv、Semantic Scholar/Crossref 风格检索和论文页。最终保留 10 篇与 CAD、CFD、FEA、PDE surrogate、PINN、neural operator、工程设计优化和工业仿真最相关的新论文。
intro_en: This weekly paper push covers 2026-07-03 to 2026-07-10. Local daily digest logs were used as the primary discovery pool, with an additional 24-48 hour sweep across arXiv and paper metadata sources. The final selection keeps 10 new papers most relevant to CAD, CFD, FEA, PDE surrogates, PINNs, neural operators, engineering design optimization, and industrial simulation.
cae_sources_checked: publisher and preprint pages where available

cae_papers.title: Neural Operator-enabled Topology-informed Evolutionary Strategy for PDE-Constrained Optimization
cae_papers.summary_zh: 将 DeepONet neural operator、拓扑表征学习和 CMA-ES 结合，用于 Maxwell 方程约束的纳米光子逆设计和结构优化等 PDE 约束问题。
cae_papers.summary_en: Combines DeepONet neural operators, topology-aware representation learning, and CMA-ES for PDE-constrained inverse design, including nanophotonic and structural optimization problems.
cae_papers.why: Direct match for generative design, PDE-constrained optimization, optical/structural CAE surrogate modeling.

cae_papers.title: Bayesian Optimization of Genetic Algorithm Hyperparameters in a Multi-Fidelity Framework for Efficient Lattice Material Design
cae_papers.summary_zh: 用 FFT homogenization、3D CNN surrogate、Gaussian process 和 Bayesian optimization 组成多保真晶格材料设计框架，降低遗传算法计算成本。
cae_papers.summary_en: A multi-fidelity lattice material design framework combining FFT homogenization, 3D CNN surrogates, Gaussian processes, and Bayesian optimization for cheaper genetic search.
cae_papers.why: Useful for AI-assisted generative design, structural materials, and multi-fidelity engineering optimization.

cae_papers.title: A Physics-Informed Neural Network for Small-Signal Stability in Multi-Inverter Power Systems
cae_papers.summary_zh: 用少量电磁暂态仿真数据训练 PINN，预测多逆变器电力系统阻抗模型的 poles 和 residues，用于稳定性和振荡风险分析。
cae_papers.summary_en: Trains a PINN on limited electromagnetic transient simulations to infer poles and residues for multi-inverter system stability and oscillation-risk analysis.
cae_papers.why: Relevant to model-based systems engineering and simulation-trained stability surrogates.

cae_papers.title: A Physics-Informed Neural Network Framework for Elastodynamic Wave Propagation in Bimaterial Systems
cae_papers.summary_zh: 把轴对称线弹性方程、界面条件和边界条件嵌入 PINN，并用 ANSYS Workbench Explicit Dynamics 高保真有限元结果验证双材料瞬态波传播。
cae_papers.summary_en: Embeds axisymmetric linear elastodynamics and interface conditions into a PINN, validated against ANSYS Workbench Explicit Dynamics simulations for bimaterial wave propagation.
cae_papers.why: Strong CAE relevance for explicit dynamics, FEA surrogates, impact, and high-strain-rate mechanics.

cae_papers.title: Mass-Conserving Physics-Informed Neural Networks For The One-Dimensional Advection-Diffusion Equation
cae_papers.summary_zh: 比较 Vanilla PINN、带质量守恒惩罚的 PINN 和 Crank-Nicolson 格式，展示守恒约束可显著降低长时间对流-扩散仿真的误差和质量漂移。
cae_papers.summary_en: Compares vanilla PINNs, mass-penalty PINNs, and Crank-Nicolson schemes, showing that conservation penalties reduce long-horizon advection-diffusion errors and mass drift.
cae_papers.why: Conservation reliability matters for CFD, transport, heat transfer, microfluidics, and sample-delivery modeling.

cae_papers.title: Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation
cae_papers.summary_zh: 提出 LLMForge text-to-CAD 框架，从自然语言规格生成参数化 3D CAD 机械零件，并用 97 个工程设计问题评估 foundation models。
cae_papers.summary_en: Introduces LLMForge for text-to-CAD generation of parametric 3D mechanical parts, evaluated on 97 engineering design tasks across multiple foundation models.
cae_papers.why: Direct match for AI for CAD, CAD-to-CAE preprocessing, and mechanical design automation.

cae_papers.title: PDEFlow: Autonomous Agentic PDE Pipelines for Neural Operator Learning and Solver-Free Inference
cae_papers.summary_zh: 把自然语言或用户级 PDE 描述转成 FEniCSx 仿真数据生成、DeepONet 训练、checkpoint 管理和无求解器推理的 agentic pipeline。
cae_papers.summary_en: Turns user-level ODE/PDE descriptions into FEniCSx-backed simulation data generation, DeepONet training, checkpointing, and solver-free inference pipelines.
cae_papers.why: Connects agents, PDE simulation, FEniCSx, and neural operators into an automated CAE workflow.

cae_papers.title: CoFINN: Conservation Flux Informed Neural Networks for Physics Problems Governed by Conservation Laws
cae_papers.summary_zh: 从有限体积角度把通量守恒约束加入 CNN surrogate，在跨声速翼型流场预测中改善气动力和高攻角阻力预测。
cae_papers.summary_en: Adds finite-volume-style flux conservation constraints to CNN surrogates, improving transonic airfoil flow and aerodynamic force prediction.
cae_papers.why: High-priority CFD surrogate paper with conservation-law structure rather than a purely black-box model.

cae_papers.title: Generalizable turbulence closures across bluff-body shapes by PINN-based solver-agnostic training
cae_papers.summary_zh: 用 PINN 施加 RANS residual 训练 solver-agnostic 湍流闭合，并冻结后部署到有限元求解器中，测试跨钝体形状泛化。
cae_papers.summary_en: Uses PINN-imposed RANS residuals for solver-agnostic turbulence-closure training, then deploys frozen closures in a finite-element solver across bluff-body shapes.
cae_papers.why: Directly relevant to CFD closure modeling, solver transfer, and engineering flow generalization.

cae_papers.title: A Deep Learning-based surrogate model for Severe Accidents in nuclear reactors using ASTEC
cae_papers.summary_zh: 用 AutoEncoder 和 Neural ODE 构建 ASTEC 严重事故仿真的深度学习 surrogate，将长时间核事故场景预测压缩到分钟级。
cae_papers.summary_en: Builds an AutoEncoder and Neural ODE surrogate for ASTEC severe-accident simulations, reducing long-horizon nuclear accident prediction to minute-scale inference.
cae_papers.why: Strong industrial simulation surrogate example for multiphysics, long rollout, and safety-critical decision support.
